- git rev-parse --short=8 HEAD 2>/dev/null || true
- git status --short 2>/dev/null || true
- find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

- README / PRD / TASK_LIST / docs
- tests
- runtime/tasks if present
- recent reports if present
- repo structure
- stale or duplicated task artifacts

- MASTER_TASKS_REFRESH.md
- ranked task table P0/P1/P2/P3
- stale/closed task list
- next 3 executable lanes
- verification commands
- recommended commit message
Rules:
- Do not invent tasks without repo evidence.
- Prefer salvage before deletion.
- Classify before destructive action.
